notes: v36.1 MINOR • Frontend only, no Code.gs change. Fixes wizard random crash: restoreRememberedUser() now guards against re-running the enter flow when a user is already logged in. Previously, every syncToCloud (which fires on wizard save, chore add, pill toggle, etc.) scheduled loadFromCloud 1.8s later, which re-ran restoreRememberedUser -> enterApp -> selectChild -> closeAllSheets, removing the .open class from the wizard sheet with no error log.
